content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 WARN — PaywallView.swift:9 offers "1 week of Premium free" in exchange for a 5-star review, explicit quid-pro-quo review incentive.
Pierre: Apple explicitly forbids offering rewards or incentives in exchange for reviews or ratings, since it manipulates App Store rankings and misleads other users. The footnote text "Leave a 5-star review and get 1 week of Premium free!" in App/PaywallView.swift:9 is a textbook violation of 2.3.9. This copy must be removed entirely — if you want to use SKStoreReviewController's native prompt, it must never be tied to a reward.
